title: RevitGeometry
description: RevitGeometry: Fragment containing the geometry extracted from Revit element represented by the BHoM object.

Edges.description: Edge curves of Revit element represented by the BHoM object carrying this fragment.

Surfaces.description: Surface geometry of Revit element represented by the BHoM object carrying this fragment.

Meshes.description: Meshed surfaces of Revit element represented by the BHoM object carrying this fragment.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
